The **Sort Puzzle** subgenre has emerged as one of the fastest-growing segments in mobile gaming.
- **Mobile Puzzle generated $10B+ in IAP revenue in 2025** (+14% YoY)
- **Sort contributed 13% of the YoY growth** in the Puzzle genre in 2025
- **Sorting mechanics lead IAP monetization**: Color sorting, screw sorting, goods sorting, and coin sorting outperform most other puzzle mechanics
- **Rollic Games dominates** with 8 titles in top 28 hybrid-casual puzzle games of 2025
